text.title: Technical Debt Trade-off Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw shortcut description to validated debt-record in the backlog.

step.name: classify-fowler
step.input: Shortcut description + "better solution" description + intent context
step.action: Tag both axes: intent (deliberate|inadvertent) and prudence (prudent|reckless). Retro-discovered shortcuts are inadvertent — do not backfill "deliberate".
step.decision-gate: If inadvertent-reckless, this is a flaw not debt — exit to incident review.

step.name: check-severity
step.action: Count distinct modules touched. ≥3 modules OR a foundation-level choice (DB, message bus, auth model) ⇒ severity=systemic.
step.decision-gate: severity=systemic → escalate to ATAM; refuse to issue DEBT id.

step.name: design-trigger
step.action: Design an observable repayment trigger: metric (numeric or enum), operator, threshold, measurement source. Example: endpoints_requiring_same_auth_check >= 3 from "git grep + endpoint count".
step.decision-gate: If trigger reads "someday" / "later" / lacks a metric, loop until concrete.

step.name: budget-check
step.action: Sum new cost + current total. If >20%, block new debt; force repayment of an existing item first.
step.decision-gate: Block ⇒ return to backlog prioritisation; pick a debt item to repay this sprint.

step.name: record-and-link
step.action: Emit DEBT-XXXX record; link to parent ADR if any; commit to backlog. Run `validate-trade-off-technical-debt.py` pre-commit.
